person.name: Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard

nameForms.fullText: Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard

parts.value: 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard

memoryArtifacts.description:
n the final decade of his life, Norfolk continued his career as a courtier, diplomat and soldier. In 1514 he joined Wolsey and Foxe in negotiating the marriage of Mary Tudor to King Louis XII of France, and escorted her to France for the wedding. On 1 May 1517 he led a private army of 1300 retainers into London to suppress the Evil May Day riots. In May 1521 he presided as Lord High Steward over the trial of Edward Stafford, 3rd Duke of Buckingham. According to Head, 'he pronounced the sentence of death with tears streaming down his face'.[3]

By the spring of 1522, Norfolk was almost 80 years of age and in failing health. He withdrew from court, resigned as Lord Treasurer in favour of his son in December of that year, and after attending the opening of Parliament in April 1523, retired to his ducal castle at Framlingham in Suffolk where he died on 21 May 1524. His funeral and burial on 22 June at Thetford Priory were said to have been 'spectacular and enormously expensive, costing over £1300 and including a procession of 400 hooded men bearing torches and an elaborate bier surmounted with 100 wax effigies and 700 candles', befitting the richest and most powerful peer in England.[4] After the dissolution of Thetford Priory, the Howard tombs were moved to the Church of St Michael the Archangel, Framlingham. A now-lost monumental brass depicting the 2nd Duke was formerly in the Church of St. Mary at Lambeth.[citation needed]

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard於1443年2月1日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 易普斯維其時，他的父親John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk21歲，母親Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk21歲。他於1472年4月30日與Elizabeth Tilney在英國諾福爾可諾維其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1524年5月21日在英國素福爾可福拉苗林加姆 卡素享年81歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可特福德 聖 瑪麗 馮 雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard was born on 1 February 1443, in Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, was 21 and his mother, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, was 21. He married Elizabeth Tilney on 30 April 1472, in Norwich, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 21 May 1524, in Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard est né le 1 février 1443, à Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Tilney le 30 avril 1472, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 21 mai 1524, à Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard am 1. Februar 1443 in Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk 21 und seine Mutter Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk 21. Er hat am 30. April 1472 in Norwich, Norfolk, England Elizabeth Tilney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Mai 1524 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England und wurde in Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard è nato il il 1 febbraio 1443 nel Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Tilney il 30 aprile 1472, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 maggio 1524, nel Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howardが1443年2月1日にイギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー イプスウィチで生まれた時，父John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolkは21歳，母Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolkは21歳であった。1472年4月30日にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチでElizabeth Tilneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1524年5月21日にイギリススフォルクフラムリンガム カストルで81歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクスエトフォード スト マリー ス レスにて埋葬された。

ko.Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Engl: 영국 수폴크 테트퍼드 스트 메리 테 레스
ko.Stoke Newland, Suffolk, England, United: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard(이)가 1443년 2월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1472년 4월 30일 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 Elizabeth Tilney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1524년 5월 21일 영국 수폴크 프램링함 카스틀에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 테트퍼드 스트 메리 테 레스에 묻혔다.

pt.1 Feb 1443–21 May 1524: 1 de fevereiro de 1443–21 de maio de 1524
pt.Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Engl: Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.Stoke Newland, Suffolk, England, United: Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1443, em Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Tilney em 30 de abril de 1472, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de maio de 1524, em Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Engl: тетфорд ст мэри т лесс, суффолк, Англия
ru.Stoke Newland, Suffolk, England, United: сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard родился 1 февраля 1443 г. в местности сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Tilney 30 апреля 1472 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 21 мая 1524 г. в местности фрамлингхам кастл, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности тетфорд ст мэри т лесс, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard nació el 1 de febrero de 1443, en Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Tilney el 30 de abril de 1472, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1524, en Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Thetford St Mary the Less, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
